description.ko: 빛의 변형적인 힘을 시각적으로 연구한 결과물로, 기하학적 크리스탈 구조를 통해 백색광이 구성 색상으로 섬세하게 분할되는 모습을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visual study of light's transformative power, showcasing the delicate split of white light into its constituent colors through geometric crystal structures.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of a multi-faceted glass prism on a neutral background, capturing the precise moment white light hits the edge and disperses into a vivid rainbow spectrum. Ethereal light rays, sharp chromatic aberration, soft caustic patterns on the surface, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, prismatic distortion, clean minimalist aesthetic.
